title: bromus diandrus var. ambigens
intro: Bromus diandrus var. ambigens, also known as false brome, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Bromus diandrus var. ambigens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
